title: Positive, negative and screenshot proof for Advisor Review and Approval

scope_result.status_policy: Accepted as process-first implementation slice only; no full DOMAIN-F closure or implemented-step claim.

positive_proof.evidence: Area entry has one primary next action and contract-backed DOMAIN-F coverage.
Advisor detail exposes compact step surface and single advisor action toward compliance review.
Typed advisor approval workflow positive spine reaches client-safe release only through compliance release gates.
Advisor queue, scoped access, option comparison, evidence request, return and advisor approval states pass.

negative_proof.rule: advisor approval is not client release
negative_proof.evidence: advisor approval persists without client release; P44-6-T09 proves advisor approval, evidence request and reject do not release

negative_proof.rule: wrong role, wrong action and wrong object fail closed
negative_proof.evidence: recommendation review workflow API fail-closed test passed

negative_proof.rule: UI does not overclaim release, export readiness or client visibility

negative_proof.evidence: p0 process coverage matrix QA report keeps completion_claim_allowed false

failed_or_retried_commands.command: parallel Playwright runs for API/matrix and P44/matrix
failed_or_retried_commands.reason: Next dev server collision; final serial reruns passed.

discover.source_truth: EPIC-10 from masterplan plus True-UX handoff and guard:source
discover.found_gap: DOMAIN-F had route/service seams but stale matrix states and missing explicit no-overclaim UI/contract proof.

define.core_problem: Advisor Review and Approval needed to become a process-first slice without pretending advisor approval is compliance release.
define.decision: Build a canonical EPIC-10 contract and wire S036/S037 surfaces to it.

divergent_options_considered: Compatibility shim around old recommendation-review test language
First-class DOMAIN-F advisor review approval contract
develop.selected_option: First-class DOMAIN-F advisor review approval contract with UI, API, negative proof and matrix update.

deliver.bold_cleanup: Removed stale compatibility expectation for compliance_release and updated matrix truth instead of leaving BP-053/BP-055 as specified_only.
deliver.remaining_limitation: Full step-level lifecycle persistence and audit failure closure are intentionally still blocked.
